selection: 按 7–10 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 圣诞老人（等于Santa Claus）
n. 圣诞节
words.definition: n. period extending from Dec. 24 to Jan. 6

words.translation: n. 山谷, 溪谷, 流域, 凹地
words.definition: n. a long depression in the surface of the land that usually contains a river

words.translation: n. 主人, 硕士, 大师, 母机；a. 主人的, 主要的
words.definition: n. directs the work of others

words.translation: n. 洞, 穴；vi. 凹陷, 塌落
words.definition: n. a geological formation consisting of an underground enclosure with access from the surface of the ground or from the sea

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: n. 山, 山脉, 大堆
words.definition: n. a land mass that projects well above its surroundings; higher than a hill

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 邪恶, 不幸, 罪恶；a. 邪恶的, 不幸的, 有害的, 讨厌的
words.definition: n. morally objectionable behavior

words.translation: n. 军队, 陆军
words.definition: n. a permanent organization of the military land forces of a nation or state

words.translation: n. 抓取, 战利品, 捕获之物；vt. 抓取, 获得, 迷住
words.definition: n. the act of forcibly dispossessing an owner of property

words.translation: n. 森林, 林区；vt. 植树于
words.definition: n. the trees and other plants in a large densely wooded area

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 囚犯, 犯人, 战俘
words.definition: n. a person who is confined; especially a prisoner of war

words.translation: n. 座, 座位, 位子, 席位, 所在地；vt. 使坐下, 使就座, 为...设座于, 使就职
words.definition: n. a space reserved for sitting (as in a theater or on a train or airplane)

words.translation: vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少
n. 前夕, 前夜
words.definition: n. (Old Testament) Adam's wife in Judeo-Christian mythology: the first woman and mother of the human race; God created Eve from Adam's rib and placed Adam and E

words.translation: n. 憎恨, 恨, 厌恶；vt. 憎恨, 憎恶
words.definition: n. the emotion of intense dislike; a feeling of dislike so strong that it demands action

words.translation: n. 玩具, 小玩艺儿, 小型的东西, 消遣；a. 供玩耍的, 作为玩具的
words.definition: n. a nonfunctional replica of something else (frequently used as a modifier)

words.translation: a. 可怕的, 令人恐惧的, 极坏的
n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: a. 忙碌的, 热闹的, 没空的；vt. 使忙
words.definition: a. actively or fully engaged or occupied

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
n. 雪, 积雪, 下雪, 雪花形干扰；vi. 下雪, 似雪般落下
words.definition: n. precipitation falling from clouds in the form of ice crystals

words.translation: n. 逃亡, 避难设备, 逃跑；vi. 逃脱, 避开, 溜走
words.definition: n. the act of escaping physically

words.translation: n. 男人, 朋友, 同事；a. 同伴的, 同事的, 同道的
words.definition: n. a member of a learned society

words.translation: a. 有力的, 有权力的, 强大的；[机] 强力的
words.definition: a. having great power or force or potency or effect

words.translation: vt. 避免, 防止, 撤消
words.definition: v. stay clear from; keep away from; keep out of the way of someone or something

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: a. 新鲜的, 新奇的, 另外的, 淡的, 精神饱满的, 冒失的；adv. 最新地, 刚刚
words.definition: a. recently made, produced, or harvested

words.translation: a. 极大的, 巨大的, 无限的
words.definition: s. unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 物体, 目标, 目的, 对象, 宾语, 客体；vi. 反对, 抱反感
words.definition: n. a tangible and visible entity; an entity that can cast a shadow

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 秘密, 机密, 秘诀, 秘方；a. 秘密的, 极机密的, 隐蔽的, 暗中的, 神秘的, 偏僻的
words.definition: n. something that should remain hidden from others (especially information that is not to be passed on)

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 烦恼, 麻烦, 困难, 动乱, 故障；vt. 困扰, 麻烦, 使烦恼, 折磨
words.definition: n. a source of difficulty

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 憎恨, 仇恨, 憎恶
a. 直接的, 坦白的；vt. 指示, 指挥, 命令, 导演
n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑
words.definition: n. the sound of laughing

words.translation: n. 忿怒；vt. 激怒, 使发怒
words.definition: n. a strong emotion; a feeling that is oriented toward some real or supposed grievance

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的
n. 城堡, 象棋中的车；vt. 置于城堡中, 盘踞于
words.definition: n. a large building formerly occupied by a ruler and fortified against attack

words.translation: n. 援救, 解救, 营救；vt. 援救, 救出, 营救
words.definition: n. recovery or preservation from loss or danger

words.translation: a. 不快乐的, 不幸的, 不适当的
words.definition: a. experiencing or marked by or causing sadness or sorrow or discontent

words.translation: a. 聪明的, 精明的
words.definition: s. showing inventiveness and skill

words.translation: n. 鼓, 鼓声；vi. 击鼓, 作鼓声
words.definition: n. a musical percussion instrument; usually consists of a hollow cylinder with a membrane stretched across each end

words.translation: n. 仙女, 精灵；a. 仙女的
words.definition: n. a small being, human in form, playful and having magical powers

words.translation: a. 愉快的, 可爱的, 活泼的, 亲切的
words.definition: a. affording pleasure; being in harmony with your taste or likings

words.translation: a. 宽广的, 辽阔的, 广大的, 显著的；adv. 宽阔地
words.definition: s. not detailed or specific

words.translation: n. 领导, 指挥, 神示, 铅板；a. 领导的, 主要的, 在前的
adv. 突然, 意外, 忽然, 迅速, 即席作成, 即刻, 急速
words.definition: r. happening unexpectedly

words.translation: adv. 到处, 贯穿全部地, 自始至终；prep. 遍及, 在各处
words.definition: r. from first to last

words.translation: n. 轨迹, 足迹, 径迹, 小道, 轨道, 磁轨, 途径；vt. 循路而行, 追踪, 通过, 用纤拉
words.definition: n. a pair of parallel rails providing a runway for wheels

words.translation: n. 忠告, 劝告, 意见, 报道, 通知
words.definition: n. a proposal for an appropriate course of action

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: a. relatively deep or strong; affecting one deeply

words.translation: vt. 发现, 找到, 暴露；vi. 发现
words.definition: v. make a discovery, make a new finding

words.translation: a. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；vt. 把...弄干
words.definition: a. free from liquid or moisture; lacking natural or normal moisture or depleted of water; or no longer wet

words.translation: n. 责任, 关税, 职务, 尊敬
words.definition: n. the social force that binds you to the courses of action demanded by that force; every opportunity, an obligation; every possession, a duty"- John D.Rockefel

words.translation: n. 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世；vt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内
words.definition: n. the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on

words.translation: n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势；vt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边
words.definition: n. the boundary of a surface

words.translation: n. 花, 开花植物, 精华, 盛时；vi. 开花, 发育, 旺盛, 成熟
words.definition: n. a plant cultivated for its blooms or blossoms

words.translation: n. 影响力, 权力, 势力；vt. 影响, 改变
words.definition: n. a power to affect persons or events especially power based on prestige etc

words.translation: adv. 作为替代, 反而
adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: v. 预防, 防止, 阻止, 妨碍
words.definition: v. keep from happening or arising; make impossible

words.translation: n. 答复, 回答, 答辩；vi. 答复, 回答, 回击, 反响, 答辩
words.definition: n. the speech act of continuing a conversational exchange

words.translation: n. 保险箱, 冷藏室；a. 安全的, 可靠的, 平安的, 稳健的, 有把握的
words.definition: n. strongbox where valuables can be safely kept

words.translation: n. 搜寻, 查究；v. 搜寻, 搜查, 探求, 调查, 搜索
words.definition: n. the activity of looking thoroughly in order to find something or someone

words.translation: n. 景观, 视力, 眼界, 阅读, 见解, 意见；vt. 看见, 瞄准
words.definition: n. an instance of visual perception

words.translation: n. 演讲, 说话, 谈话, 言语, 引语, 民族语言
words.definition: n. (language) communication by word of mouth

words.translation: n. 速率, 速度, 迅速；vi. 加速, 超速, 快进
words.definition: n. distance travelled per unit time

words.translation: a. 奇怪的, 陌生的, 生疏的, 不熟悉的, 不可思议的, 外行的, 外地的, 异乡的
words.definition: a. being definitely out of the ordinary and unexpected; slightly odd or even a bit weird

words.translation: n. 补给, 供给, 供应品；vt. 补给, 供给, 提供, 补充
words.definition: n. an amount of something available for use

words.translation: n. 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力；vt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动
words.definition: n. the event of something coming in contact with the body

words.translation: n. 旅游, 观光旅行, 任期；vi. 旅行, 周游, 巡回
words.definition: n. a journey or route all the way around a particular place or area

words.translation: n. 信任, 信赖, 相信, 受托, 职责, 信心, 托拉斯；a. 信托的, 托拉斯的
words.definition: n. something (as property) held by one party (the trustee) for the benefit of another (the beneficiary)

words.translation: a. 有用的, 有益的；[机] 有用的, 有效的
words.definition: a. being of use or service

words.translation: a. 平常的, 通常的
words.definition: a. occurring or encountered or experienced or observed frequently or in accordance with regular practice or procedure

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 担心, 烦恼, 忧虑, 苦恼, 撕咬；vt. 使烦恼, 使焦虑, 使苦恼, 困扰, 折磨, 撕咬
words.definition: n. a strong feeling of anxiety

words.translation: n. 内容, 满足, 意义, 要旨；a. 满足的, 满意的
words.definition: n. everything that is included in a collection and that is held or included in something

words.translation: vt. 分配, 散布, 分发
words.definition: v. administer or bestow, as in small portions

words.translation: n. 遗憾, 同情, 怜悯, 憾事, 可惜；vt. 同情, 怜悯
words.definition: n. an unfortunate development

words.translation: n. 绳, 索, 粗绳, 绞索, 决窍；vt. 捆, 缚, 绑, 圈起, 以绳将...系住
words.definition: n. a strong line

words.translation: n. 橡皮, 橡胶, 做摩擦动作的人, 按摩师, 决胜盘；vt. 用橡胶制造, 涂橡胶于
words.definition: n. an elastic material obtained from the latex sap of trees (especially trees of the genera Hevea and Ficus) that can be vulcanized and finished into a variety

words.translation: a. 失望的
adv. 容易地, 轻易地, 流利地
words.definition: r. with ease (`easy' is sometimes used informally for `easily')

words.translation: a. 预期的；预料的
words.definition: a. considered likely or probable to happen or arrive

words.translation: a. 温和的, 文雅的
words.definition: s. soft and mild; not harsh or stern or severe

words.translation: n. 伤害, 害处；vt. 伤害, 损害
a. 平静的, 和平的, 和平时期的, 爱好和平的, 喜爱安静的
words.definition: a. not disturbed by strife or turmoil or war

words.translation: n. 隧道, 地下道；vi. 挖隧道
words.definition: n. a passageway through or under something, usually underground (especially one for trains or cars)

words.translation: n. 勇气, 胆量
words.definition: n. a quality of spirit that enables you to face danger or pain without showing fear

words.translation: a. 空的, 空虚的, 空腹的, 空洞的；n. 空的东西, 空车
a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的
words.definition: a. showing or causing joy and pleasure; especially made happy

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: n. 制造, (手工)制造业, 制作, 形成, 发展, 要素, 内在因素, 赚头, 制造物
words.definition: n. (usually plural) the components needed for making or doing something

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: n. 平原, 草原, 朴实无华的东西, 无格式；a. 简单的, 明白的, 平常的, 不好看的, 朴素的, 清晰的, 普通的, 平坦的, 十足的
words.definition: n. extensive tract of level open land

words.translation: n. 快乐, 愉快, 令人高兴的事, 娱乐, 希望；v. (使)高兴
words.definition: n. a fundamental feeling that is hard to define but that people desire to experience

words.translation: n. 遗憾, 后悔, 悔恨, 抱歉, 歉意；vt. 为...感到遗憾, 后悔, 惋惜, 懊悔, 抱歉
n. 羞耻, 羞愧, 耻辱；vt. 使羞愧, 侮辱
words.definition: n. a painful emotion resulting from an awareness of inadequacy or guilt

words.translation: n. 沉默, 无声, 静寂, 湮没, 无声息；vt. 使缄默
words.definition: n. the state of being silent (as when no one is speaking)

words.translation: n. 天空, 天色, 天堂；vt. 击向空中, 挂在高处
words.definition: n. the atmosphere and outer space as viewed from the earth

words.translation: n. 印, 邮票, 打印器, 戳子, 图章, 印花税票, 标志, 特征, 类型, 跺脚；vt. 盖章于, 顿足, 贴上邮票, 铭刻, 捣碎, 扑灭
words.definition: n. a type or class

words.translation: n. 暴风雨, 骚动, 风波, 风暴, 猛攻；vi. 起风, 猛冲, 怒吼
words.definition: n. a violent weather condition with winds 64-72 knots (11 on the Beaufort scale) and precipitation and thunder and lightning

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
vt. 采用, 正式通过, 收养, 接受
words.definition: v. choose and follow; as of theories, ideas, policies, strategies or plans

words.translation: n. 出现, 露面, 外观, 外表, 出版
words.definition: n. outward or visible aspect of a person or thing

words.translation: a. 有扶手的, 武装的, 有防卫器官的
words.definition: a. (used of persons or the military) characterized by having or bearing arms

words.translation: n. 带子, 队, 乐队；v. 联合, 结合
words.definition: n. instrumentalists not including string players

words.translation: n. 耽搁, 迟滞；v. 耽搁, 延迟
words.definition: n. time during which some action is awaited

words.translation: vt. 破坏, 毁坏, 消灭
words.definition: v. do away with, cause the destruction or undoing of

words.translation: n. 紧急状况, 紧急事件, 紧急需要
words.definition: n. a sudden unforeseen crisis (usually involving danger) that requires immediate action

words.translation: n. 飞行, 射程, 逃走, 飞跃, 飞机航程, 班机, 迁徙, 飞逝；vi. 迁徙
words.definition: n. a formation of aircraft in flight

words.translation: n. 自由, 坦率, 特权
words.definition: n. the condition of being free; the power to act or speak or think without externally imposed restraints

words.translation: n. 法官, 裁判员, 审判官, 鉴定人；vt. 审理, 鉴定, 判断, 判决, 裁定
words.definition: n. a public official authorized to decide questions brought before a court of justice

words.translation: n. 狭窄部分, 隘路；a. 狭窄的, 仔细的, 有限的, 勉强的, 狭隘的, 手紧的
words.definition: n. a narrow strait connecting two bodies of water

words.translation: n. 场合, 时机, 机会, 诱因, 理由；vt. 惹起, 引起
words.definition: n. reason

words.translation: a. 无虑的, 安心的, 安全的, 可靠的, 保险的；vt. 固定, 获得, 保证, 使安全, 掩护, 招致
words.definition: a. free from fear or doubt; easy in mind

words.translation: n. 有背长椅；vt. 决定, 整理, 安放, 使定居, 使平静, 支付, 安排, 解决, 结算
words.definition: n. a long wooden bench with a back

words.translation: n. 半升音调, 利刃, 骗子；a. 锋利的, 明显的, 敏锐的, 急剧的, 尖刻的, 严厉的, 刺耳的, 精明的
words.definition: n. a musical notation indicating one half step higher than the note named

words.translation: n. 发射, 炮弹, 射击, 射手, 投篮, 射门, 子弹, 射程, 拍摄, 注射；vt. 装弹, 使成颗粒状
words.definition: n. a solid missile discharged from a firearm

words.translation: n. 马房, 牛棚；a. 稳定的, 安定的, 坚固的, 坚定的
words.definition: n. a farm building for housing horses or other livestock
